CVE-2014-5461.title: Buffer overflow in the vararg functions in ldo.c in Lua 5.1 throu ...
CVE-2014-5461.description: Buffer overflow in the vararg functions in ldo.c in Lua 5.1 through 5.2.x before 5.2.3 allows context-dependent attackers to cause a denial of service (crash) via a small number of arguments to a function with a large number of fixed arguments.

CVE-2021-43519.title: Stack overflow in lua_resume of ldo.c in Lua Interpreter 5.1.0~5. ...
CVE-2021-43519.description: Stack overflow in lua_resume of ldo.c in Lua Interpreter 5.1.0~5.4.4 allows attackers to perform a Denial of Service via a crafted script file.
